summary: Skia renderer preview boundary, local parity, native install/build, native parity, and SVG-vs-Skia comparison evidence are complete for Developer Preview.

completedEntries.notes: Skia package remains optional and avoids static Skia imports.

Local primitive tests plus LineChart, BarChart, PieChart, ProgressChart, ContributionGraph, CombinedChart, and CandlestickChart renderer contract tests run through npm run skia:parity. The local tests cover Skia font-backed text measurement, measured text anchors, and the injected sticky Y-axis label path.
The optional-Skia native release helper plans and runs checks in a temporary workspace so @shopify/react-native-skia is not committed to the free showcase package.
Android temporary showcase app installed @shopify/react-native-skia@2.6.2, verified it with npm ls, configured the :shopify_react-native-skia Gradle project, and completed assembleRelease.
iOS temporary showcase app installed @shopify/react-native-skia@2.6.2, verified it with npm ls, autolinked the react-native-skia CocoaPods target, and completed Release xcodebuild.

Temporary iOS and Android showcase apps installed @shopify/react-native-skia@2.6.2, injected the Skia renderer through ChartKitProvider, typechecked the patched showcase, and completed Release native builds.
iOS simulator and Android emulator renderer-injected Skia showcase captures rendered free and Pro-preview chart surfaces without native renderer errors in the reviewed logs.
iOS simulator and Android emulator comparison artifacts record screenshot, log, timing, frame, and memory evidence for the same showcase scenarios used by SVG baseline artifacts.

coveredSurfaces: PieChart and DonutChart SVG text labels
ContributionGraph and CalendarHeatmap SVG text labels
